prompt:
Saya punya kode berikut:

[PASTE KODE]

Tolong:
1. Jelaskan fungsinya
2. Cari bug (jika ada)
3. Berikan versi yang lebih optimal

Create an image using the original face from the reference photo without changing the facial structure, skin tone, or identity. The face must remain identical, natural, and realistic (not Al-generated looking).
MacBook screen selfie mirror, medium close-up (chest up), slightly tilted framing (subtle tilt), main focus to the laptop screen, realistic perspective as taken using HP from the front of the screen.
outfit: oversized black hoodie made from cotton fleece, worn hood, without big logo, relaxed loose fit, wear thick frame glasses
pose: head slightly lowered and tilted, hair covering part of the eye, one hand styled near the nose, the other hand holding the iPhone as if a mirror photo, cool expression, relaxed, not made up environment:
minimalist room with dim light, vertical line panel wall background + marble texture, on the MacBook screen visible Photo Booth application preview window, Spotify application on the side.
light from the MacBook screen (soft cool light) + ambient indoor light warm thin, natural, without cinematic effects, without bokeh, facial details remain sharp and realistic aspect ratio: 3: 4
negative prompt: worst quality, low quality, lowres, blurry, ugly, distorted, deformed, watermark, text, signature, bad anatomy, bad hands, missing fingers, extra limos, fused fingers, distorted face, plastic skin, unrealistic reflection.
